events.title: Drake Vs. Kendrick Lamar: Who hits more streams in the next 24 hours?
events.summary: If Drake records more verified combined streams than Kendrick Lamar in the 24-hour measurement window, this market resolves to Drake.
events.notes: This event is mutually exclusive and resolves from official published data sources.
rules: Resolution sources include Spotify Charts, YouTube Music analytics, and Apple Music chart snapshots.
If either artist releases a new track during the window, all streams still count as long as they are publicly available.
In case of a tie after all sources are normalized, the market resolves 50/50.
events.timelineAndPayout: The market closes at 23:59 UTC and resolves within 12 hours after source verification. Winning YES shares settle at $1.00 and losing shares settle at $0.00.
events.prohibitions: Users with direct reporting access to unreleased source data may not trade this market before public publication.
